case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-PORT OF SF. VS DLA FINANCIAL et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DLA FINANCIAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $524.45 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-PORT OF SF. AS TO DEFENDANT DLA FINANCIAL LEONARD, DENI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DLA FINANCIAL LEONARD, DENI $524.45 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $559.45, DENI LEONARD IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
